summary: Completed backend (pytest) and frontend (Playwright) testing for To,Do institutional site. All 9 backend tests and all 14 frontend flow validations passed. Projects (6), Services (6), Contact POST persistence, validation 422s, and /api/status legacy route all work as expected. Frontend hero, nav anchors, work grid, services grid, about section, footer, contact form (success + validation), and mobile menu all function correctly.

minor.issue: In server.py, `logger` is referenced inside create_contact's except block but defined after app.include_router; works at runtime because handler is called later, but risky ordering. Also consider adding GET /api/contact access control since list is public.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py: `logger` is used in the `except` of create_contact but logger is declared later in the file. Works because execution is deferred, but move logging.basicConfig/logger above route handlers for clarity.
GET /api/contact is public and returns all contact submissions (including emails). Consider restricting or removing it for production to avoid PII exposure.

Contact.jsx performs client-side validation (name/email/message length>=10) but does not check email format; backend enforces EmailStr. This is acceptable but a small format hint pre-submit would reduce round trips.
MOCKED_PROJECTS/MOCKED_SERVICES are in-memory; fine given the product requirement (mocked), but add a comment noting this is intentional.
Backend CORS defaults to '*' via env; acceptable for marketing site but lock down in prod.
seed_data_creation: Each contact test creates a TEST_ prefixed document in MongoDB 'contacts' collection; not cleaned up (acceptable volume, IDs prefixed for easy identification).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Regression test file at /app/backend/tests/test_api.py covers projects/services/contact/status. Public URL used is REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Frontend Playwright flow: hero -> work(6 cards + highlight) -> services(6 cards) -> about -> contact (validation toast + success toast + form clear) -> nav link scroll -> mobile menu. All data-testids confirmed present.
